title: SOZIALE INVESTITIONSRENDITE (SROI)
subtitle: Lernendes Netzwerk zum psychischen Wohlbefinden (Belgien)
description: A case study applying the Social Return on Investment (SROI) methodology to a farmers' learning network focused on mental wellbeing in Belgium. It evaluates projected wellbeing outcomes and economic returns over a five-year period under the Horizon 2020 FARMWELL project.
